name: Patient 10
history: Recent divorce with financial struggles. Co-parenting. Multiple friendships deteriorated. Complicated relationship with parents.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: Divorce proves I'm unlovable and defective.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll always be alone; no one wants a divorced person.
coping_strategies: Social withdrawal, overcompensating in parenting, financial anxiety.
situation: Experiencing the breakdown of friendships following the divorce.
auto_thought: "They never really liked me. I'm too much trouble now. Everyone's leaving."
behavior: Stops reaching out to friends, declines invitations, tells self it's easier alone.
